Subject: Walter Cuminns -Vessel Berthing Line as on 17/11/2025 - All Indian
Ports !! WCS India
 
Dear Sir/Madam,
 
Good day,
 
Greetings from Walter Cuminns!!
 
Please find attached the detailed berthing line-up of vessels scheduled to
call at Indian seaports. At Walter Cuminns, we take pride in delivering
timely, precise, and real-time intelligence, coupled with seamless
assistance to ensure the smooth handling of your esteemed vessels across any
Indian port.
 
About Walter Cuminns Group :
Walter Cuminns Group (WCG), established in 2021, has swiftly risen as a
paragon of maritime service excellence, distinguishing itself in the
competitive realm of shipping and logistics. With a strategic presence
across key global locations including India, Sri Lanka, Indonesia, Malaysia,
Singapore, Egypt, UAE, Bangladesh, and Spain, WCG has become synonymous with
unparalleled service delivery, innovation, and client satisfaction in the
maritime industry. Headquartered in Cochin, India, the Walter Cuminns Group
has swiftly ascended to the pinnacle of the shipping and maritime industry.
Renowned for its unparalleled service quality and unwavering transparency,
the group has distinguished itself as a beacon of trust and excellence.
Walter Cuminns Shipping Services has rapidly expanded its global footprint,
proudly serving vessels worldwide. With a specialized team of professionals,
we ensure unwavering support to vessels of every category across Indian
ports. Our group encompasses distinct divisions:
 
1.	Walter Cuminns Shipping Services - Core Shipping Agency Division
2.	Walter Cuminns Holidays - Travel & Tourism Division
3.	Walter Cuminns Crewing - Crew Manning & Placement Division
4.	Astaria Port Desk - Disbursements & Agency Appointments
5.	Cargo Broking, Chartering & S&P Broking - Cargo and Vessel
Commercial Services
6.	We take immense pride in introducing the scope of our specialized
services:
 
Key Services:
Port Agency . Protective Agency . Vessel Husbandry . Cargo Operations .
Vessel Broking . Vessel Clearance . Dry Docking . Bunker Coordination .
Cargo Supervision . S&P Broking . Chartering . Cargo Broking . Crew Manning
. CTM Delivery . Husbandry & Repairs . Crew Change Operations . Visa /
Immigration Formalities . Travel & Ticketing . Owners' Matters . Spare
Delivery . Fresh Water & Provision Delivery
 
Global Presence:
India . Sri Lanka . Egypt . Singapore . UAE . Bangladesh . Spain . Gibraltar
. Malta (covering all major seaports)
